ChatGPT Images 2.0 (Pro) creates a photo of a Rubik’s Cube—albeit in a very simple state—resting on a mirror.

The task of a radiologist was to read scans. The purpose was to diagnose disease.

When AI handles the task, the purpose doesn’t shrink. It grows.

This paper argues that the scattered pieces are becoming something like a mechanics of learning, with solvable toy worlds,

Happy Friday! 

We just put DeepSeek-V4-Pro up on https://t.co/es07MrTxSs. It’s the world’s largest open source model at 1.6T parameters, and you can run it for free running on NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs.

Agentic AI is changing how R&D teams move from hypothesis to validated outcomes.

Microsoft Discovery brings together agentic orchestration, advanced reasoning, knowledge foundations, and high‑performance computing to modernize scientific discovery across biology, materials

You would consume less computer credits (and be able to run more tasks as a result) if you switched to GPT-5.5 as your default orchestrator. This was the number one complaint about Computer (being credits/token hungry). GPT 5.5 is more token-efficient in subagent orchestration.
GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API!
@openaidevs GPT-5.5 is now available in GitHub Copilot! Give it a try in VS Code and let us know what you think!

At @perplexity_ai, GPT-5.5 in Codex helped build an internal tool in under an hour.

In Perplexity Computer workflows, GPT-5.5 used 56% fewer tokens on the same complex tasks, creating faster feedback loops for users. https://t.co/iEuZ9ttsRo
GPT-5.5 is delivering broad, noticeable gains. It's more capable, demonstrates greater endurance, and, importantly, is more efficient.

Really impressed by how smooth switching most of my coding tasks to Codex (GPT-5.5) from Claude Code (Opus 4.7) has been.

I thought it was going to be more difficult and that I would be "fighting" with the model a lot. 

If there was ever a good time to try Codex, it would be

We’ve been using Sakana Fugu internally for our own research and coding. Instead of relying on a single model, it dynamically orchestrates the best combination of open and closed models for any task. The future of AI is collective intelligence.
